officialSources.name: Caching with Cache Components
officialSources.purpose: Core `use cache`, Suspense, runtime APIs, and PPR behavior.

officialSources.name: Revalidating
officialSources.purpose: Tag and path invalidation behavior including `updateTag`.

officialSources.name: Migrating to Cache Components
officialSources.purpose: Migration from route segment configs and previous caching model.

policy: Use this skill only for Cache Components projects. For projects using the previous model, load the general nextjs-best-practices data caching rules first.
